nodes.name: codacy.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs the Codacy security scan on pushes and PRs to main (plus a weekly cron) and uploads SARIF results to GitHub code scanning.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a pinned SHA for the third-party codacy-analysis-cli-action and sets max-allowed-issues to int max so SARIF generation always succeeds.

nodes.name: codeql.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CodeQL Advanced workflow that analyzes the repo across an actions/javascript-typescript/swift language matrix on pushes, PRs, and a weekly cron.
nodes.languageNotes: Matrix dynamically picks macos-latest for Swift analysis and ubuntu-latest for the rest; build-mode differs per language (none vs. autobuild).

nodes.name: proof-html.yml
nodes.summary: Minimal GitHub Actions workflow that runs anishathalye/proof-html against the ./site directory on PRs and pushes to main to validate HTML output.
